title: Tolmachevia integrifolia

The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, providing relief from various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. Bioactive constituents of Tolmachevia integrifolia include alkaloids, glycosides, and flavonoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Tolmachevia integrifolia is commonly used in traditional medicine and is often prepared as a decoction or an infusion, as well as being used in the production of tinctures and extracts.
